---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

# Curriculum Vitae

## Experience

**Co-Founder & Managing Director** — Planningio GmbH, Hamburg · [since 2023]{.cv-meta}

- Development of automation and optimization solutions for production planning, with a focus on the beverage and process industries
- Responsible for commercial and administrative management; secured more than €300,000 in external funding

**Lecturer** — Kühne Logistics University, Hamburg · [since 2024]{.cv-meta}

- English-language course based on the book "Algorithms to Live By", focusing on algorithms and optimization in everyday and business decisions
- Developed a hands-on Python format introducing students to data-driven decision models

**Lecturer** — Universität Hamburg · [2023]{.cv-meta}

- Interdisciplinary course on entrepreneurship in operations and supply chain management
- Strong involvement of industry partners to give students real-world founding experience

**Research Associate** — Universität Hamburg · [2018 – 2022]{.cv-meta}

- Teaching in production and logistics (B.Sc.) and supply chain management (M.Sc.); supervision of seminar, bachelor's, and master's theses on quantitative methods
- Research and publications in business analytics

**Intern, Supply Chain Management** — Wallenius Wilhelmsen, Bremen · [2016]{.cv-meta}

- Contributed to a factory-to-dealer approach for BMW to efficiently manage global vehicle supply chains

## Education

**Dr. rer. oec.** (summa cum laude) — Universität Hamburg · [2018 – 2022]{.cv-meta}

Dissertation: "Choice-based analytics with applications in supply chain contracting and carbon emission reduction initiatives"

**M.Sc. Business Administration** (grade 1.1, top of class) — Universität Hamburg · [2015 – 2018]{.cv-meta}

**B.Sc. Business Administration** — Universität Hamburg · [2012 – 2015]{.cv-meta}

## Publications

- Roemer et al. (2023). A Choice-based Optimization Approach for Contracting in Supply Chains. *European Journal of Operational Research*, 305(1), 271–286.
- Roemer et al. (2023). Offset or reduce: How should firms implement carbon footprint reduction initiatives? *Production and Operations Management*, 32(9), 2940–2955.

## Awards

- Professor Herbert Jacob Prize, Universitätsgesellschaft Hamburg (2024) — for an outstanding dissertation in business administration with high scientific and practical relevance
- Gründungspreis, Digital Innovations Competition, German Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs and Climate Action (2023) — Planningio recognized as one of Germany's most innovative start-ups
- Best Master's Graduate, Universität Hamburg (2018)
- DPG Abitur Prize, German Physical Society (2011)

## Academic Service

- Reviewer for OR Spectrum and Transportation Research
- Juror for the Hamburg Teaching Award and the KREATI case study competition (Verband Deutscher Wirtschaftsingenieure e.V.)

## Skills

**Core:** Mathematical optimization & operations research · Statistics & data science · Supply chain management & logistics · Entrepreneurship & business leadership

**Tools:** Python, R, VBA · GAMS, MATLAB, CPLEX · STATA, SPSS · LaTeX, Quarto

## Languages

German (native) · English (fluent) · French (basic)
